issues.description: Condition checks 'HasCardOnBoard' with name 'GERMA 66', but should check if Leader has {GERMA 66} type using 'LeaderHasType' condition

Action is 'PlayFromHand' only, but card text includes 'You may trash this Character' as a cost/requirement and allows playing from 'hand or trash' — should include both PlayFromHand and ability to play from trash, or use more specific action
Filter uses 'maxCost' but card says 'with a cost of 5' (exact cost); should clarify if this means cost ≤5 or exactly 5
